message:
test(conformance): add OBJECT subcommand tests for HyperLogLog keys

Added tests for OBJECT ENCODING/IDLETIME/REFCOUNT/FREQ with HyperLogLog
keys to verify HLL values report "raw" encoding and work correctly with
all OBJECT subcommands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
